description: A free, open-source desktop application that displays live heart rate data as a floating, always-on-top overlay on macOS, Windows, and Linux. Designed for streamers, gamers, and athletes who want to show their real-time BPM on screen.
capabilities: Live BPM display via WebSocket connection to HypeRate
Global keyboard shortcut to toggle overlay
Full UI customization (style, color, font, layout, animation)
data_privacy: No telemetry, no analytics, no data collection. Preferences stored locally only.
